prompt: A realistic scene showing a highly intricate, oddly shaped key perfectly fitting into one unusual lock, while several normal standard locks nearby remain unopened and incompatible with the same key. The setting is a wooden table with natural lighting. The key looks overly complex and customized. Photorealistic, high detail, natural shadows, no text, no symbols, no diagrams.
metaphor: An over-customized key fits one unique lock perfectly but fails to open normal locks, representing memorization without generalization.
